title: Meeting Planner Organizer
scenario: Develop a meeting plan for a team of 8 members. The plan should include the meeting topic, start/end time, and a list of attendees. The meeting is scheduled for 1 hour and will be held weekly for the next 4 weeks.
constraints: Must include the meeting topic and start/end time
Each attendee's name should be on a new line

evaluationCriteria.description: The meeting plan includes the correct topic, start/end time, and attendees.
Each attendee's name is included in the meeting plan.
The meeting plan is easy to read and understand.
